_comment: Single source of truth for the accepted SWTools runtime artifact hashes. Current accepted package: releases/1.1.3/SWTools-1.1.3-Setup.exe, setup sha256 82a7e93ea8a2a809c70ed486fd22c2e0b3baae9c0ffa03e819ab52dc7b122f7b. Both scripts/verify_release_package.ps1 and scripts/sw_test_preflight.ps1 load their default expected hashes from this file. Update here when the accepted build changes.
